design_identity.name: Cognitive Offloading Lab
design_identity.theme_strategy: Light Mode Default (Clinical/Clean) with Dark Mode Toggle (Data/Focus)

typography.rules: Use Outfit for all headings (h1-h3). Use Inter for body text, inputs, and dense data tables. Use JetBrains Mono for data values or code snippets.

primary.description: Deep Indigo - Represents Cognitive Function and Focus

secondary.description: Cyan - Represents Data and Scientific Precision

layout.spacing_scale: 2x standard. Use p-6 or p-8 for containers. Gap-6 for grids.

grid_strategies.dashboard: Bento Grid (Mode B). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap-6. Dense data.
grid_strategies.marketing: Asymmetric Tetris Grid (Mode A). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12. Gap-12. Breathable.
grid_strategies.participant: Single Focus Column. max-w-2xl mx-auto. Distraction-free.

button.primary: bg-indigo-600 text-white hover:bg-indigo-700 shadow-sm rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-transform active:scale-95
button.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium
button.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-lg px-4 py-2

input.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-indigo-600 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

navigation.sidebar: w-64 bg-slate-900 text-slate-300 h-screen fixed left-0 top-0 overflow-y-auto
navigation.header: h-16 border-b border-slate-200 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md sticky top-0 z-50

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-white/20 shadow-sm (Use for sticky headers and overlays)
visual_enhancers.gradients: Subtle mesh gradients. Use 'bg-gradient-to-br from-indigo-50 to-cyan-50' for section backgrounds.
visual_enhancers.texture: Add 2% noise opacity to solid backgrounds to reduce digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid #E2E8F0. For 'Active' states, use 'ring-2 ring-indigo-100 border-indigo-500'.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 for text. Use Slate-900 for body text on white.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Respect 'prefers-reduced-motion'. Use opacity fades instead of transforms.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Outfit'.
Do not use full-screen heavy gradients. Use subtle mesh gradients or clean white/slate backgrounds.
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes.
Researcher Dashboard should be dense (Bento Mode B). Participant view should be focused (Single Column).
Progress Tracker should use a clean 'Linear-style' list or Gantt view, not a clunky table.
Time-compression simulation requires clear visual indicators of 'Simulated Time' vs 'Real Time'.

instructions_to_main_agent.styling: Use Tailwind classes exclusively. Avoid inline styles.
instructions_to_main_agent.charts: Use Recharts for data visualization. Style them to match the Indigo/Cyan palette.
